title: Startup bonus
subtitle: {{total}} in real money so you can start earning from day one

banner.desc: When you recharge a client, they pay you in cash and the bonus covers the digital balance. You keep the money. It's yours — it's not a loan.

como.title: HOW IT WORKS
como.paso1: A client asks for a recharge and pays you in cash
como.paso2: You recharge the client in the app — the bonus covers the digital balance
como.paso3: The cash the client paid you is yours to keep
como.paso4: Plus you earn a 10% commission on every recharge
